prompt: We have 5 projects across web, iOS, and backend. I need a dashboard showing validation posture so the team lead can spot which ones need urgent attention before next sprint planning. Set it up.
expected_output: User runs collect-team-metrics.sh, edits .vf/team/projects.json to add all 5 projects with paths, runs team-dashboard.sh, gets color-coded table with Critical/Attention/Healthy buckets. Dashboard shows scores, regressions, coverage (though coverage will be 0 until /validate-benchmark outputs enriched format).
